summary: Provides details on how to log in to the ERP system, the dashboard interface, and the use of quick links for frequently accessed options.
steps: Log in using your phone number and OTP, or set a password.
The dashboard will display your company/entity name and user ID.
The top session displays the current session.
Use the search bar for sessions.
Add quick links for daily used options (e.g., 'Collect Fee') for direct access.
business_rules: Access to options is permission-based (e.g., students see admission, fee clerks see fee options).
Quick links are user-specific and can be updated according to each user.
important_notes: The URL will be shared for homescreen attachment.
Your entity's name and your ID will be displayed on the dashboard.
questions: How do I log in to the ERP system?
What is the URL for ERP login?
How can I customize my ERP dashboard?
Where can I find my company's name on the dashboard?
How do I add a quick link to my dashboard?
